assertions.description: INCORRECT: Net-(U1-Pad39) is reported as unrouted with 26 pads all listed as 'U1.39'. The ESP-WROOM-32 module pad 39 is the exposed copper thermal slug on the bottom of the module, which KiCad represents with multiple sub-pads (thermal relief vias). The connectivity algorithm counts each sub-pad as a separate instance, sees they share the same footprint.pad reference, and incorrectly treats the set as an unrouted ratsnest. The same false positive appears in ESP32-adapter (U2-Pad39, 26 pads). This is a false routing-completeness failure for boards using ESP32 module footprints.
